title: TetoCraftMod
description: Teto? Give her bread to make her sing!
body:
# ​🥖 **TetoCraft: The Chimera Diva Mod**  

​TetoCraft brings the beloved UTAU character Kasane Teto into your Minecraft world as a fully interactive entity. Powered by GeckoLib, Teto comes to life with smooth animations, custom sound effects, and unique AI behaviors.  

## ✨ Main Features 

High-Quality Model: A detailed, fully animated 3D model of Kasane Teto.  ​

The Bread Mechanic: Teto loves bread!  

​Feeding: Right-click her with bread to start a concert.  ​

Scavenging: If you drop bread on the ground, she will run over and eat it!  ​

Singing & Buffs: When Teto sings, she grants Regeneration effects to all nearby players. She is the perfect bard for your adventures, yet she is a chimera and isnt tamable.  

​Custom Audio: Includes original voice lines for ambient sounds, taking damage, and singing (created using OpenUtau, the song is not mine tho).  

​Chimera Nature: She sleeps at night (if not singing) wherever she is at. 

![Singing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43b8211bc81fd5fa6e0943436325a83881ca9cdc.png)

# ​⚙️ Requirements & Installation  ​

1. Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge). ​
2. GeckoLib (This mod is REQUIRED for TetoCraft to work). ​
3. Drop the .jar file into your mods folder. ​
